# seedAppLimitDefaults

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the seedAppLimitDefaults mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.seedAppLimitDefaults({ input: { defaults: '<JSON>' } }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run seedAppLimitDefaults

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.seedAppLimitDefaults({ input: { defaults: '<JSON>' } }).execute();
```
